content.fact_text: A centralized, production-ready logging module implemented with Pino for the inventory dispatch service.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides structured, asynchronous JSON logging for the inventory dispatch service, featuring automated PII redaction and hierarchical context injection for improved observability.
interfaces: export interface LogContext { module: string; requestId?: string; correlationId?: string; sku?: string; batchProcessId?: string; [key: string]: any; }
provenance_data.utility: Ensures production-grade observability and PII security compliance across the inventory dispatch event-processing lifecycle.
